title: Trace Receipt Integration
description: A schema for integrating carrier-swarm inference missions with trace receipts, contribution records, activation records, early exit records, and audit boundaries.

integration_id.description: A unique identifier for the trace receipt integration record.

version.description: Version identifier for this integration record.

description.description: Human-readable description of the trace receipt integration.

mission_reference.description: Reference to the related Carrier Swarm Mission.

mission_id.description: Identifier of the related carrier-swarm mission.

mission_schema.description: Schema used by the referenced mission.

mission_status.description: Current status of the referenced mission.

activation_policy_id.description: Optional identifier of the activation policy used by the mission.

trace_receipts.description: Trace receipts generated during the carrier-swarm mission.

receipt_id.description: Unique identifier for the trace receipt.

generated_by.description: Node or actor that generated the receipt.

node_id.description: Identifier of the node or actor.

role.description: Role of the node or actor in the mission.

related_stage.description: Mission stage related to this receipt.

external_reference_id.description: Optional external trace receipt or audit record identifier.

required_for_audit.description: Whether this receipt is required for future audit.

contribution_records.description: Contribution records for wing, carrier, trace, or human participants.

eligible_for_reward_allocation.description: Whether this contribution may be used by future royalty or compute allocation layers.

carrier_activation_record.description: Record of whether and why the carrier model was activated.

carrier_activated.description: Whether the carrier model was activated.

decision_reason.description: Reason for carrier activation or non-activation.

triggered_by.description: Conditions, nodes, or reports that triggered the decision.

activation_policy_id.description: Identifier of the activation policy used.

trace_recorded.description: Whether the activation decision was recorded.

early_exit_records.description: Optional records of early exit decisions.

reason.description: Reason for allowing or rejecting early exit.

decided_by.description: Node, policy, or actor that made the early exit decision.

trace_recorded.description: Whether the early exit decision was recorded.

filtered_event_records.description: Optional records of events filtered before carrier activation.

filtered_by.description: Wing node or policy that filtered the event.

audit_boundary.description: Audit and governance boundary for the integrated trace record.

trace_complete.description: Whether the trace record is complete enough for review.

external_trace_link_allowed.description: Whether this record may link to external trace receipt protocols.

royalty_integration_ready.description: Whether this record contains enough contribution information for future royalty or compute allocation integration.
